name: LoRA TTT 50-ep Cosine + SOTA (10L Int5-MLP Int6-Attn BigramHash SWA)
author: Atharva Date
blurb: SOTA training (10L, Int5-MLP, Int6-Attn, BigramHash(10240), SWA) with document-isolated multi-epoch LoRA TTT at evaluation. 50-epoch cosine LR decay (lr=0.001→0) on rank-8 LoRA adapters targeting Q and V in all 10 attention layers. Score-first per chunk (backward-looking). LoRA reset between documents, zero artifact cost. SWA start_frac=0.35 (vs SOTA 0.40). warmdown_iters=3500. Pending 3-seed H100 validation.
